title: Pleurothallis adeodata
taxonomy: Pleurothallis adeodata is a species of orchid in the genus Pleurothallis. The genus Pleurothallis is a part of the family Orchidaceae. Pleurothallis adeodata is commonly found in Central and South America, and its classification is within the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This subtribe is further classified under the tribe Spiranthinae, which is part of the subfamily Vanilloideae. The classification of Pleurothallis adeodata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.

Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
